title: Bedrock-Style Cursors
description: Bedrock-style cursors for Minecraft Cursor mod
body: --- ℹ️ A resource pack that brings the cursor from Bedrock to Java Edition and expands upon it with even more cursors! 📌 Requires the [Minecraft Cursor](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod. --- NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
